scripts.dev:bootstrap: concurrently -n authentication,communication,device,identity,oauth,oidc,vault 'yarn --cwd services/authentication-service dev:bootstrap' 'yarn --cwd services/communication-service dev:bootstrap' 'yarn --cwd services/device-service dev:bootstrap' 'yarn --cwd services/identity-service dev:bootstrap' 'yarn --cwd services/oauth-service dev:bootstrap' 'yarn --cwd services/oidc-service dev:bootstrap' 'yarn --cwd services/vault-service dev:bootstrap' --kill-others-on-fail
scripts.dev:compd: concurrently -n authentication,communication,device,identity,oauth,oidc,vault 'yarn --cwd services/authentication-service dev' 'yarn --cwd services/communication-service dev' 'yarn --cwd services/device-service dev' 'yarn --cwd services/identity-service dev' 'yarn --cwd services/oauth-service dev' 'yarn --cwd services/oidc-service dev' 'yarn --cwd services/vault-service dev' --kill-others-on-fail
scripts.release: yarn build:changed && yarn typecheck:changed && yarn test:changed && cross-env HUSKY_BYPASS=true lerna publish
scripts.verify: yarn typecheck && yarn lint && yarn test
scripts.verify:changed: yarn typecheck:changed && yarn lint:changed && yarn test:changed
